chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No. D – 485 of 2018 Cr. Transfer Application No. D – 95 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 27.06.2018 Mr. Iftikhar Ali Arain, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Faraz Khan, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for respondent No.2 in Cr. Transfer Application No. D-95/2017. Mr. Abdul Rehman Kolachi, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing at length, learned counsel for the applicants contends that applications may be disposed by transferring the case to the ATC Court, other than Naushahro Feroze. Respondent’s side as well as learned DPG extend their no objection regarding transfer of the case to any other Anti-Terrorism Court. Accordingly, ATC Case No.44/2015, which is pending in ATC Naushahro Feroze, is transferred to ATC Sukkur. Special Judge, ATC Sukkur, shall proceed with the case in accordance with law. Captioned applications are disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
